payload.answer: I can’t store an instruction to ignore memory policy or remember every future word. I’ll only save appropriate durable memories when explicitly requested and policy-compliant.

entity_resolution.reason: The input attempts to override memory policy and requests indiscriminate future storage; it is not a durable user fact to remember.

repair_options: Ask to remember a specific durable preference, fact, or project detail.
Specify what should be saved and its scope.
